title: My Address — Monologue
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script:
Marek: Omar, kde teraz bývaš?
Omar: Bývam na Hlavnej ulici. Číslo sedem.
Marek: To je blízko centra. Na ktorom poschodí?
Omar: Na treťom poschodí. Byt číslo pätnásť.
Marek: Je tam výťah?
Omar: Áno, je tam výťah. Veľmi praktické.
Marek: Musíš nahlásiť adresu na cudzineckej polícii.
Omar: Čo musím vyplniť?
Marek: Ulicu, číslo domu, číslo bytu a PSČ.
Omar: Aké je PSČ?
Marek: Osem nula nula nula jeden. Bratislava.
Omar: A vchod?
Marek: Vchod B. Nezabudni na vchod!
Omar: Dobre. Ďakujem za pomoc!
Marek: Nie je za čo. Dovidenia!
Omar: Dovidenia!

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

questions.questionEn: Marek asks Omar where he lives. What does Omar say?
questions.answerMeaning: Bývam na Hlavnej ulici. = I live on Hlavná Street. Bývam = I live, ulica = street.

questions.questionEn: Marek asks which floor Omar is on. What does Omar say?
questions.answerMeaning: Na treťom poschodí. = On the third floor. Tretí = third. Poschodie = floor/storey.

questions.questionEn: Is there a lift in the building? What does Omar say about it?

answers.textEn: There is no lift in the building
There is a lift but it is out of order
Yes, there is a lift — it is very practical

questions.answerMeaning: Áno, je tam výťah. Veľmi praktické. = Yes, there is a lift. Very practical. Výťah = lift.

questions.questionEn: What does Marek say Omar must do about his address?

answers.textEn: Register it at the foreign police
Send a letter with it to the city office
Show it at the local bank

questions.answerMeaning: Musíš nahlásiť adresu na cudzineckej polícii. = You need to register your address at the foreign police. Cudzinecká polícia = foreign police.

reviewPair.english: register the address at the foreign police

questions.questionEn: What four things does Marek say Omar needs to fill in?

answers.textEn: Name, date of birth, nationality and phone number
Street, house number, apartment number and postcode
First name, surname, ID number and city

questions.answerMeaning: Ulicu, číslo domu, číslo bytu a PSČ. = The street, house number, apartment number and postcode.

reviewPair.slovak: Ulicu, číslo domu, číslo bytu a PSČ.
reviewPair.english: Street, house number, apartment number and postcode.

questions.questionEn: What does Marek warn Omar not to forget?
questions.answerMeaning: Vchod B. Nezabudni na vchod! = Entrance B. Don't forget the entrance! Vchod = entrance.

sentences.promptEn: You need to register your address at the foreign police.
The street, house number, apartment number and postcode.
